title: atalantia rotundifolia
intro: Atalantia rotundifolia, also known as the Malay plum or round-leaved atalantia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Atalantia rotundifolia include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion, as well as providing protection against certain types of cancer and neurodegenerative diseases. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are administered orally to harness its therapeutic benefits.
